results.name: peacock
results.description: Peacocks and peahens.

results.name: pedestal
results.description: depicts an object sitting atop a pedestal.

results.name: peek
results.description: Cards that give you access to hidden information (Yours or other players)

results.name: peek-hand
results.description: Take a quick look at a players hand

results.name: peek-library
results.description: Look at some number of cards from the top of libraries

results.name: peema
results.description: An enormous forest on Kaladesh.

results.name: peladon
results.description: A planet in the Doctor Who universe, first seen in the Third Doctor serial "The Curse of Peladon"

results.name: peril
results.description: Things in some sort of danger.

results.name: perpetual aura
results.description: Auras that come back to your hand as they "fall off".

results.name: per-player
results.description: A spell or ability that scales to become more powerful with the number of players; i. e, "For each player, do X"

results.name: persecution effect
results.description: Some Creatures get +N/+N, while other creatures get -N/-N

results.name: personal-text
results.description: Cards referring to themselves or other objects in ways that personify then beyond a singular objectified ‘it’. Note: This is NOT for cards that previously referred to players with his or her and were oracled to use their.

results.name: perspective
results.description: Tags describing art perspectives.

results.name: perspective blur
results.description: Portions of the art are blurred to produce the illusion of being closer or further away than other portions of the image.

results.name: perspective from above
results.description: Perspectives coming from above.

results.name: perspective from below
results.description: Perspective in such a way that the camera is below the subject, looking up.

results.name: peryton
results.description: A mythological creature that is a stag/bird hybrid.

results.name: peter
results.description: A woodsman from Eldraine, older brother to Ruby, enchanted by the witch Agatha to serve as her champion.

results.name: peter parker
results.description: The original Spider-Man.

results.name: petroglyph
results.description: Stone carvings. Also see [cave painting].

results.name: phage the untouchable
results.description: When the Patriarch attempted to destroy Jeska, her planeswalker spark and the intervention of the Numena Kuberr instead made her Phage the Untouchable, cursed so that her touch would rot anything organic.

results.name: phallic
results.description: We are all adults around here (except April).

results.name: phase manipulation
results.description: Cards that interact with the phases of a turn, usually by having players skip or gain additonal ones.

results.name: phasing
results.description: Cards that involve phasing, whether the action or ability.

results.name: phoenix with set's mechanic
results.description: A phoenix with one of the set's iconic mechanics or mechanical themes.
